reasoning: The Wikipedia page "List of infectious diseases" currently leaves the "Vaccine(s)" column blank for Gonorrhea (as of Oct 2025). The only vaccine specifically targeting Gonorrhea in active clinical trials is GSK's NgG, which is only in Phase 2 with a readout expected in 2025. This means that formal development and approval are years away. While the meningitis vaccine Bexsero (4CMenB) provides some cross-protection and is being used off-label in the UK (since May 2025), it has not prompted Wikipedia editors to add it as a Gonorrhea vaccine in the several months since. Thus, the likelihood of a newly approved vaccine being developed and listed on this Wikipedia page, or the page being revised to include Bexsero, by February 2026 is extremely low. Evaluated probabilities remain near the bottom boundary.
